title: Arena Allocator Implementation
description: Implement a simple arena allocator in Zig that implements the Allocator interface. The arena should support bulk allocation and single-operation deallocation.
requirements: Back the arena with a child allocator (configurable)
Support alloc, resize, and free operations
Implement reset() to free all allocations at once

few_shot_examples.prompt: Create an allocator vtable function for alloc.
